name: Calculating Permanent Disability Ratings

mainEntity.name: How to calculate permanent disability for occupational illness in Millcreek?
mainEntity.text: How to calculate permanent disability for occupational illness in Millcreek?

acceptedAnswer.text: Millcreek occupational disability uses AMA Guides ratings by approved physicians, converted to % whole person for indemnity.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Lung capacity or range-of-motion yields ratings. Insurers undervalue; appeal to ALJ. Murray rating clinics specialize.[5]
